content.full_text:
May 16, 1990

Mary Ruth Gross  
National Women's Political Caucus  
of Santa Clara County  
Post Office Box 636  
San Jose, CA 95106

Re: Your Request For Advice  
Our File No. A-90-290

Dear Ms. Gross:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.1/

Your letter, dated April 17, 1990, correctly summarizes my advice that nothing in the Act would require NWPC-PAC to return contribution checks received in connection with a fundraising event when the event changed from a spaghetti dinner to a reception. A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan  
General Counsel

By: Alice Hughes  
Political Reform Consultant  
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

Enclosure

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
